items.name: masthead
items.title: Masthead
items.description: Newspaper header with title, date, volume/issue, double-rule borders, and serif typography.

items.name: wanted-poster
items.title: Wanted Poster
items.description: One Piece wanted poster bounty card with parchment texture, distressed edges, and bounty display.

items.name: headline-banner
items.title: Headline Banner
items.description: BIG NEWS! breaking-news alert banner with severity levels (breaking/update/bulletin) and dismiss.

items.name: column-layout
items.title: Column Layout
items.description: Multi-column newspaper grid with column rules, drop caps, justified text, and responsive columns.

items.name: news-coo-badge
items.title: News Coo Badge
items.description: Notification badge with News Coo bird silhouette, supporting dot/count/icon/new variants.

items.name: newspaper-theme
items.title: Newspaper Theme
items.description: Grand Line Gazette theme — OKLCH color tokens, serif fonts, sharp corners, and editorial styling for light/dark mode.

items.name: theme-toggle
items.title: Theme Toggle
items.description: Light/dark mode toggle button with Sun/Moon icons for the newspaper theme.
